_meta.description: Machine-readable artifact contracts for every pipeline phase. Each phase must produce outputs conforming to its contract before the next phase may begin.

phase_00.name: Program Scope & Standards

taxonomy.md.description: Authoritative vocabulary for all artifact fields and enums

done_criteria.json.description: Numeric stop rules for all phases

phase_00.gate: all required_fields present in scope.yaml; no forbidden synonyms in any artifact

phase_01.name: Component Pack Build

component_pack_{pack_id}.db.description: SQLite database containing taint map for one component

component_manifest.json.description: Summary manifest for the component pack

phase_01.gate: component_manifest.json present; function_count > 0; chokepoint_count >= critical_chokepoints_pct from scope.yaml

phase_01a.name: Component Certification

cert_report.json.description: Certification result for one component pack. Rules applied are language- and app-agnostic; thresholds sourced from done_criteria.json phase_01a.

field_notes.observed_chokepoint_pct: Percent of cp_chokepoints rows with confidence_class=Observed. Denominator is pack_db_chokepoint_count (post-dedup). Determines Certified vs Conditional path per done_criteria.json.
field_notes.certification_basis: Which confidence_class levels contributed: e.g. 'Observed+Correlated+Inferred' or 'Correlated+Inferred'. Informational.
field_notes.function_coverage_pct: Functions found by extractor vs estimated total (rg count / rg count, always 100 for static-only; meaningful when compared across runs for variance).
field_notes.chokepoint_coverage_pct: Confirmed chokepoints (Observed+Correlated) / pack_db_chokepoint_count. Denominator is always post-dedup pack DB count.
field_notes.extraction_raw_chokepoint_count: Mean chokepoint count across N deterministic extraction runs, before builder deduplication. Used for variance check only.
field_notes.pack_db_chokepoint_count: Chokepoint count in the stored component_pack_{pack_id}.db cp_chokepoints table after builder deduplication. Authoritative count for all other metrics.
field_notes.extraction_pack_delta_pct: abs(extraction_raw_chokepoint_count - pack_db_chokepoint_count) / extraction_raw_chokepoint_count * 100. Must be <= done_criteria.json extraction_pack_delta_max_pct. A non-zero delta is expected (builder deduplicates by fqn+chokepoint_type). A delta above threshold indicates a builder or extractor defect.

phase_01a.gate: status != Failed; function_coverage_pct >= coverage_targets.function_instrumentation_pct; chokepoint_coverage_pct == 100; see done_criteria.json phase_01a for full Certified vs Conditional rules

phase_02.name: Component Registry & Versioning

pack_registry.json.description: Index of all published component packs

phase_02.gate: all required_component_packs from scope.yaml present in registry at Certified or Conditional status; sha256 hashes verified

phase_03.name: App Surface Inventory

routes.json.description: All HTTP routes extracted from app source

api_endpoints.json.description: REST/GraphQL/RPC endpoints if present per scope.yaml

entrypoint_catalog.json.description: Complete catalog of all entrypoint types including non-HTTP

phase_03.gate: entrypoint_catalog.json present; no unknown_route_families; auth_boundary_map covers all CRITICAL tier routes

phase_04.name: Graph Composition

appmap_composed.db.description: Composed taint graph merging component packs with app glue

phase_04.gate: orphan_node_count == 0 for CRITICAL and HIGH tier nodes; all edges have provenance tag; all sinks have sink_context_mark

phase_05.name: Targeted Runtime Verification

runtime_trace_min.db.description: Minimal runtime trace from targeted verification replay

verification_delta.json.description: Delta between composed graph and runtime-confirmed paths

phase_05.gate: preflight_pass == true; source_event_count >= 1; sink_event_count >= 1; boundary_event_count >= 1; critical_joins_confirmed / critical_joins_total >= coverage_targets.composed_joins_confirmed_pct / 100

phase_09.name: Correlation & Contradiction Resolution
phase_09.gate: unresolved_critical_contradictions == 0; all CRITICAL lineages have final classification; no STATIC_ONLY promoted to CONFIRMED

phase_10.name: AI Adjudication & Tool QA

machine_actionable_fixes.json.description: Agent-consumable. Each fix references a specific phase, artifact, field, and change.

human_review_queue.csv.description: Analyst-consumable. One row per lineage or gap requiring human judgment.

phase_10.gate: every fix in machine_actionable_fixes.json has at least one evidence_row_id or evidence_file_path; no fix without citation

phase_11.name: Gap Closure Iterations
phase_11.gate: coverage_delta_pct >= 0 (negative = regression, escalate); stop_rule_met evaluated against done_criteria.json

phase_12.name: Golden Snapshot & Merge Readiness
phase_12.gate: fk_check_pass == true; vocabulary_alignment_pass == true; orphan_node_count == 0; artifact_hashes verified

phase_13.name: Operations for Multi-App Expansion

app_onboarding_{app_id}.yaml.description: Per-app config covering only app-specific overrides

runbook.md.description: Operational runbook for running the pipeline on this app

phase_13.gate: new app can complete phase_03 through phase_09 using only app_onboarding_{app_id}.yaml without schema changes
